question: [File: 'File Name: rest/balances.js -> Scope: Medium: Impacts caused by griefing with no economic damage to any user on the network'] [Function: getBalances()] Can an unprivileged external user rapidly paginate through all balance results by following the `links.next` URL returned in `formatBalancesResult()`, issuing sequential requests that each trigger a full DB query, causing sustained DB load that degrades response times for all other users without any rate limiting enforced at the application layer?
